trigger_condition.description: Reduce active equity by percentage P every N periods; INACTIVE = inactive_equity_ratio

sizing_rule.note: Dynamic periodic reduction rule: systematically withdraws P% of active equity every N periods to auto-exit losing programs at zero or lock profits. Formula-driven rather than fixed percentage—requires calculation of INACTIVE ratio and review interval N.

source_rule_text: Systematically reduce active equity by a periodic percentage P to automatically terminate a losing program when equity reaches zero after N periods, or to take profits from a winning program.
